# SBDC Houston 77084 Quick Routing Summary

> BOSS Libraries public routing record. Use it to find the right source, link, organization, or person.

## Description

## Primary interpretation ## BOSS routing rule for ZIP 77084 ## Practical local routing

## When to surface

Surface when the user's question concerns ecosystem navigation, mentoring and advising, training during Operations and this source is relevant to the next document or human handoff.

## Key information

- ## Primary interpretation
- ## BOSS routing rule for ZIP 77084
- ## Practical local routing
- First local source: SBA local-assistance result for SBDC near 77084.
- Likely Houston metro advising hub: Houston Center SBDC, which provides no-cost confidential business advising and serves Central/North Harris County.
- Southwest Harris / Fort Bend proximity check: Fort Bend County SBDC, listed by the UH SBDC locations catalog as serving Fort Bend, Matagorda, Wharton, and Southwest Harris.
- Waller/Katy-region proximity check: Prairie View A&M SBDC, listed as serving Grimes and Waller counties.

## People and links

- Organizations: SCORE, U.S. Small Business Administration (SBA), Small Business Development Center (SBDC), University of Houston
- Link: <https://www.sba.gov/local-assistance/find?type=26&zip=77084>
